items.title: Nested Cross-Validation for Model Selection (Varma & Simon, 2006)
items.author: Rajinder Varma, Richard Simon
items.note: Core reference for inner tuning vs outer estimation—central to mitigation-focused nested CV.

items.title: scikit-learn: Tuning hyperparameters with GridSearchCV
items.author: scikit-learn developers
items.note: Practical inner CV loops for ridge, SVM, and forest hyperparameter selection.

items.title: Cross-Validatory Choice and Assessment of Statistical Predictions (Stone, 1974)
items.author: M. Stone
items.note: Historical foundation for rotating validation; evaluation protocol details in Model Evaluation topic.
